title: Stranger Than Us
overview: An unexpected love story begins on the Norfolk Coast, Tom & JD are two strangers meeting in the night. As the weekend in the middle of nowhere continues the two unravel each others secrets, and hardships; will their new found affections be enough to endure their revelations?
